root.sql: select sc_mem_edit_salary.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_edit_salary.membership_no ) as memname, sc_mem_edit_salary.entry_id, sc_mem_edit_salary.operate_date, sc_mem_edit_salary.pre_salary_amount, sc_mem_edit_salary.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name from sc_mem_edit_salary, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_edit_salary.membership_no /*WHERE*/
